name: transfer-player-data
description: Compute offline-mode UUIDs and move a player's save data (full profile or inventory-only) between usernames/slots after a name or account change ("换电脑","换用户名","背包转移","搬背包","离线uuid","数据丢了").
body:
NBT tools hidden by default — confirm "NBT 工具" is on in AI 设置, else tell the user to enable
it and stop.

`nbt(action=offline_uuid, username)` gives the offline UUID (`OfflinePlayer:<name>`); playerdata
files are `<dashed-uuid>.dat`. A "换账号/换用户名后存档丢了" report is usually just
username→UUID changing — check with `offline_uuid` first, not corruption.

- **Full move**: `offline_uuid` for old+new names, then `nbt(action=copy_player_data, world,
  from, to, DESTRUCTIVE)` — moves ALL data (pos, health, XP, inventory, ender chest),
  overwriting destination.
- **Inventory only**: `nbt(action=transfer_inventory, world, from, to, includeEnderChest?,
  DESTRUCTIVE)` — items only, keeps destination's pos/health/XP.

World must be closed in-game. Run `instance(action=worlds_backup_create, world)` first — both
overwrite the destination. Show resolved UUIDs before transferring.
